description: NACA 4418R reconstructed from NACA-WR-L-451 graph and table at Reynolds ~3.24e6

source.name: NACA-WR-L-451
source.notes: Reference CSV is conservatively reconstructed from Figure 4 and Table I. The source table reports slope 0.092 per degree, zero-lift angle about -2.8 deg, cl_max about 1.46, and cd_min about 0.0081 for the NACA 4418R section.
